error.signature: colcon: packages have a circular dependency: pkg_a -> pkg_b -> pkg_a

verdict.summary: Two or more packages depend on each other forming a cycle. colcon cannot determine build order.

dead_ends.why_fails: Hides the cycle; one package will always build with stale dependencies

dead_ends.action: Copy shared headers directly between packages
dead_ends.why_fails: Creates undeclared dependencies; breaks on clean builds and CI

workarounds.action: Extract shared types/interfaces into a separate package
workarounds.how: Create pkg_interfaces with only .msg/.srv/.action files, depend on it from both packages

workarounds.action: Visualize the dependency graph to find the cycle
Use build_depend vs exec_depend correctly in package.xml
